reviews.review_text: Alicia was wonderful waitress and really made my nephews Birthday extra special.  Thanks for going above and beyond!

The cheese in the quesadilla was rubbery. The cheese on the chimichanga was not the usual white creamy queso; it was pale orange and tasted like knock off velveeta. I always liked the Tex-Mex here, but I was disappointed.
